text:
LONG NAME: CLM_ORIG_CNTL_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 23 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: When an encounter record has been adjusted, the claim control number (CLM_CNTL_NUM) for the 
version of the record that is being adjusted appears in the CLM_ORIG_CNTL_NUM field – and then a 
new CLM_CNTL_NUM is assigned to this updated record. A null/missing CLM_ORIG_CNTL_NUM 
indicates that a
